title: wedelia elata
intro: Wedelia elata, also known as the creeping wedelia or creeping signal plant, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia elata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, as well as its use in skin care and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Wedelia elata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
